summary: Verified Production Receive bug fix: 1) Production Output entries display as +1 (green/positive) in inventory ledger table and dialog, 2) Production Consumed entries display as negative (red), 3) Backend atomic validation ensures ALL materials are validated BEFORE any ledger entries are created. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified on both AccountantInventory and StockReports pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix verified: Lines 9830-9858 validate ALL materials have sufficient stock BEFORE creating any entries
Backend fix verified: Lines 9860-9884 create consumption entries only AFTER all validations pass
Frontend fix verified: production_output is in the positive entry types array at lines 839, 843, 1726, 1730 in AccountantInventory.jsx
Frontend fix verified: production_output is in the positive entry types array at lines 446, 449 in StockReports.jsx
Atomic validation prevents partial ledger entries - if any material fails, HTTPException raised before any DB writes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Receive bug fix verified. Production Output entries show +1 in green, Production Consumed entries show negative in red. Backend validates all materials atomically before creating ledger entries.

features_tested.Backend atomic validation: PASS - Validates ALL materials before creating entries (code review verified)
features_tested.GET /api/inventory/ledger: PASS - Returns production entries with correct quantities
features_tested.GET /api/reports/stock-ledger: PASS - Shows correct quantities for production entries
features_tested.AccountantInventory Ledger tab: PASS - Production Output +1 green, Production Consumed -15 red
features_tested.StockReports Stock Ledger tab: PASS - Production Output +1 green, Production Consumed -15 red

bug_fix_verification.original_issue_1: Raw materials were being consumed twice when receiving production
bug_fix_verification.fix_1: Backend now validates ALL materials FIRST (lines 9830-9858), then creates entries (lines 9860-9884) - atomic validation prevents double consumption
bug_fix_verification.original_issue_2: Manufactured Master SKU was showing negative quantity (-1) instead of positive (+1)
bug_fix_verification.fix_2: Frontend now includes 'production_output' in positive entry types array, displaying +1 in green instead of -1 in red
